script: echo '===== Test endpoint with correct Host header =====' && for p in '/emily-claude/api/messages' '/emily/api/messages' '/aixa/api/messages'; do echo -n "$p -> "; curl -sk -o /dev/null -w 'http_code=%{http_code}\n' -X POST -H 'Host: openclaw-sdneuro.westus2.cloudapp.azure.com' "https://127.0.0.1${p}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}'; done; echo; echo '===== Move .bak files OUT of sites-enabled (nginx ignores symlinks/regular-files) =====' && cd /etc/nginx/sites-enabled && ls -la *.bak* 2>/dev/null && mkdir -p /etc/nginx/sites-disabled && sudo mv /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/mskai-bot.bak-* /etc/nginx/sites-disabled/ 2>&1 && sudo mv /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/yooai-bot.bak-* /etc/nginx/sites-disabled/ 2>&1; echo 'after move:'; ls /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/; echo; echo '===== Validate + reload nginx =====' && sudo nginx -t 2>&1 | tail -5; sudo systemctl reload nginx && echo 'reloaded'; echo; echo '===== Re-test emily endpoint =====' && for p in '/emily-claude/api/messages' '/emily/api/messages'; do echo -n "$p -> "; curl -sk -o /dev/null -w 'http_code=%{http_code}\n' -X POST -H 'Host: openclaw-sdneuro.westus2.cloudapp.azure.com' "https://127.0.0.1${p}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}'; done
